mapper.sql: select id, picture, video, warning_time, handle_time, create_time, instruction, type, name, scene, status, handle, ip, section from yn_user_xj
mapper.insert: insert into yn_user_xj(picture, video, warning_time, handle_time, instruction, type, name, scene, status, handle, ip, section) values(#{picture}, #{video}, #{warningTime}, #{handleTime}, #{instruction}, #{type}, #{name}, #{scene}, #{status}, #{handle}, #{ip}, #{section})
mapper.update: update yn_user_xj set picture=#{picture}, video=#{video}, warning_time=#{warningTime}, handle_time=#{handleTime}, instruction=#{instruction}, type=#{type}, name=#{name}, scene=#{scene}, status=#{status}, handle=#{handle}, ip=#{ip}, section=#{section} where id=#{id}
mapper.delete: delete from yn_user_xj where id in #{id}
